title: alstonia muelleriana
intro: Alstonia muelleriana, also known as the Queensland Mulberry or Black Acacia, is a medium-sized tree native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Alstonia muelleriana include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Alstonia muelleriana can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to be used for medicinal purposes.
